product: Makeup Remover 5.07 fl oz, Gentle Oil Cleanser, Removes Waterproof Makeup & Impurities, Luxury Skincare By Dr. Barbara Sturm
description:
Effective cleansing is essential for healthy, hydrated skin and that includes thorough make-up removal. Sleeping in make-up disrupts the nocturnal renewal processes of the skin which can lead to breakouts, irritation and inflammation. Dr. Barbara Sturm's lightweight and non-greasy MAKE-UP REMOVER effectively and gently cleanses the skin, removing all traces of make-up including stubborn, long-wear foundation and waterproof mascara. The formulation consists of two phases that are combined by shaking the bottle. The water phase is enriched with micelles; tiny clusters of molecules which bind to oil, removing both water-soluble and fat-soluble make-up residue and dirt for clean and refreshed skin. The oil phase, which contains Almond, Apricot and Sunflower Seed Oils, as well as valuable moisturizers Betaine, Hyaluronic Acid and Biosaccharides, supports the skin’s protective lipid layer, balances the skin’s delicate pH and leaves the complexion soft and supple. Alongside its cleansing and moisturizing benefits, the MAKE-UP REMOVER contains prebiotics to strengthen the microbiome and support the skin’s defense against environmental stressors, such as pollution, UV damage and atmospheric skin aging. The MAKE-UP REMOVER is fragrance-free, vegan and suitable for sensitive skin.

• Lightweight and Non-Greasy Formula: Removes make-up and impurities effectively without leaving residue on skin
• Advanced Cleansing Technology: Contains oil and water phase with micelle technology for thorough makeup removal
• Removes All Makeup Types: Effectively removes all traces of make-up including long-wear foundation and waterproof mascara
• Nourishing Skin Support: Precious oils support the skin's protective lipid layer while prebiotics strengthen the microbiome and support skin's defense
• Gentle on Sensitive Skin: Suitable for sensitive skin types with a fragrance-free and vegan formulation
• Hydrating Ingredients: Enriched with Almond, Apricot and Sunflower Seed Oils, plus Betaine, Hyaluronic Acid and Biosaccharides for moisture balance
• Environmental Protection: Contains prebiotics to defend against environmental stressors such as pollution, UV damage and atmospheric skin aging

product: Cap Camarat 75ml Eau de Parfum
description: About the Designer: Memo Paris was launched in 2007 by Clara Molloy and her husband John, with the desire to celebrate the beauty of the world through perfume, from its breathtaking places to the richness of its cultures. This curiosity for far-flung places and encounters reflects the founding couple: she, a Parisian-Catalan poetess, and he, a sporty Irish globe-trotter. Each fragrance forges its identity around magical, graceful destinations, inspiring creations with dedicated, high-quality raw materials. The most beautiful landscapes deserve the most beautiful natural ingredients, and the talented perfumers at Memo Paris have a rare freedom to express their creativity: the compositions they bring to life evolve on the skin with intensity and character, all in subtle nuances, like a perfumed journey, leaving a memorable sensation. Memo Paris has made its home at 24 Rue Cambon, in the 1st arrondissement of Paris, with creations also available in over forty countries or regions worldwide.
